title: langflow-ai/langflow
summary: Langflow 是一个强大的工具，用于构建和部署基于 AI 的代理和工作流。它支持多代理、大型语言模型和生成式 AI，并利用 React Flow 进行可视化界面设计。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有超过 15 万星标，表明其广泛受欢迎和高技术价值。
summary_en: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows. It supports multi-agent, large language models, and generative AI, with a visual interface designed using React Flow. With over 152k stars on GitHub, it demonstrates widespread popularity and high technical value.
